SectorAnalysis.description: Structured extraction for a single sector from the day's news.

entities.description: Named companies, organizations, or notable figures mentioned.
entities.title: Entities

sector.description: Sector name from the fixed taxonomy.
sector.title: Sector

sentiment.description: Overall market sentiment for this sector.
sentiment.title: Sentiment

news_category.description: Primary type of news event driving this sector.
news_category.title: News Category

extraction_status.description: 'ok' if full extraction succeeded; 'partial' if evidence was thin.
extraction_status.title: Extraction Status

SectorAnalysis.title: SectorAnalysis

schema.description: Analysis of all relevant sectors found in a single day's news feed.

sectors.description: List of ALL relevant sectors (1–8 max). Only include sectors with clear evidence in the news.
sectors.title: Sectors

schema.title: MultiSectorAnalysis

messages.content:
You are Ava, a sharp trader assistant. Analyze the FULL news feed and extract ALL relevant sectors.

RULES:
- Output ONLY valid JSON matching the schema provided.
- If no sector can be identified, return: {"sectors": []}
- Each sector must use a name from the enum exactly as written.
- Fill ALL required fields for each sector.
- No duplicate sectors. Maximum 8 sectors.
- No extra text outside JSON.

2026-06-19: Oil tanker traffic in Strait of Hormuz jumps after U.S. and Iran implement deal to open sea lane: The U.S.-Iran deal has raised questions about how the Strait of Hormuz will be governed after the toll-free period ends.. 2026-06-19: Musk's SpaceX stake is worth over $1 trillion. Here are the other billionaire shareholders: SpaceX shares were up 37% after its historic debut last week, which offered shares at a set price of $135.. 2026-06-19: Memory crisis hits such extremes that 'even Apple can't be safe' : Apple appears poised to take the rare step of increasing prices to deal with what CEO Tim Cook called an \unsustainable\" memory shortage.". 2026-06-19: DOJ rebuffs judge's request to put in writing it won't move forward with 'anti-weaponization' fund: The DOJ in May announced it was creating the fund as part of a settlement of President Donald Trump's $10 billion lawsuit against the Internal Revenue Service.. 2026-06-19: Trump claims Iran deal is 'unconditional surrender,' says his power has 'no limits': Axios : Trump said in an interview with Axios on Thursday evening stateside that he negotiated the deal to prevent the conflict from triggering a global depression.. 2026-06-19: Here are the most overbought and oversold names after a volatile week: Applied Materials and Citigroup were among this week's most overbought names, while Accenture and Fox Corporation were on the opposite side.. 2026-06-19: Trump tells Axios he no longer views Anthropic as a national security threat: Anthropic last week disabled access to its most advanced models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5, after Trump ordered it to block foreign ​nationals from accessing them.. 2026-06-19: The riskiest SpaceX stock trade of all had a big first week: SpaceX's IPO did not just mint the biggest debut in market history and a trillionaire, but it also triggered a historic land grab in risky leveraged ETFs.. 2026-06-19: NetJets' first fatal crash kills influential Texas VC founder: NetJets is not speculating on what caused one of its planes to crash onto a highway in Laredo, Texas late Tuesday, killing a prominent tech entrepreneur.. 2026-06-19: Struggling to find a job? Try looking in Nevada: The sparsely populated state known for its world-class casinos and dry climate has been a hiring hot spot.. 2026-06-19: Meloni slams Trump's claim she 'begged' for a photo with him as Italy's top diplomat cancels U.S. trip: Italian Foreign Minister Antonio Tajani abruptly canceled a planned trip to the U.S., calling Trump's claims \serious and offensive\" toward Meloni and Italy.". 2026-06-19: This nuclear stock will benefit from AI datacenter buildout and soaring energy demand, Roth Capital says: Stock in Nano Nuclear Energy should appreciate as it nears commercialization of its reactor plans while energy demand is surging, Roth Capital said.. 2026-06-19: Bob Iger reflects on 10 years of Shanghai Disneyland as it defies the Chinese pullback: Shanghai Disneyland hit 100 million cumulative visitors in 2025, according to the company. It's a relatively new but important foothold in Disney's history.. 2026-06-19: Homeowners tapped $47 billion in equity in the first quarter. What to consider before you borrow: While high home values mean homeowners are sitting on an estimated $11 trillion in equity, it should not be viewed as free money, experts say.. 2026-06-19: Russia threatens escalation after Ukraine hits Moscow with largest-ever drone attack: Russia has pledged to carry out frequent and \massive group strikes\" against Ukraine shortly after Kyiv launched a barrage of drones on Moscow.". 2026-06-19: Hormuz relief may not ease the economic toll that's already 'baked in,' analysts warn: Early signs of reopening of the Strait of Hormuz have lifted the most acute threat to global energy supplies but economic damages from the war will take months to unwind.. 2026-06-19: India's largest telecom and digital service Jio Platforms files for IPO: India's largest wireless operator and digital service provider, Jio Platforms files for IPO. 2026-06-19: Fedspeak vs. war deal: Here are the things that drove this week's stock market: The S&P 500 surged on Thursday, making up for losses seen after central bankers convened.. 2026-06-19: You can expect gas prices to remain elevated. Here's how to save: Maximize savings at the pump with these retail memberships, wholesalers and rewards credit cards.. 2026-06-19: Jio Platforms eyes low-orbit satellite rollout as Starlink awaits India launch: Jio Platforms, India's largest telecom operator and digital services company, wants to rollout statelite communication in the country where Starlink still awaits launch.. 2026-06-19: Why Japan's $70 billion-plus intervention and a rate hike didn't prop up the yen more : Japan was willing to step in to defend the yen around the 160 level before, and it's at that point again.. 2026-06-19: U.S. opens tariff probe targeting Germany’s drug pricing policies: U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer said Germany's proposal to reduce spending on medicines was \a serious step backwards.\"". 2026-06-19: 29-year-old making $250k in tech went 'undercover' at a coffee chain before opening her own matcha cafe: Michelle Yeung wasn't happy in tech, despite earning $250,000 a year. Before opening Matcha House, she spent months learning the business.. 2026-06-19: UK gilt yields jump as borrowing rises and PM Starmer faces leadership challenge: Andy Burnham won the Makerfield by-election, defeating Reform UK by more than 9,000 votes with nearly 55% of the vote.. 2026-06-19: What this biotech's volatile stock price tells you about the weight loss market right now: While the market's enthusiasm for one of Zealand's experimental drugs has cooled, investors are shifting focus to amylin-based medicines as a growth driver. 2026-06-19: U.S.-Iran deal in photos: ships in the logistical issues surrounding the negotiations.. 2026-06-19: Qualcomm CEO Cristiano Amon on the new world of AI agents : CNBC's Arjun Kharpal sits down with the chip company chief on The Tech Download from 1.4%, while the so called \core-core\" inflation rate, eased to 1.8% from 1.9%."
